name: Like the Diabell
name_jp: ライク・ザ・ディアベル
desc: If a Spell/Trap(s) is sent to the GY by a card effect: Set 1 Spell/Trap from your hand or GY, but it cannot be activated this turn. During your Main Phase: You can banish 3 Spells/Traps from your GY, including this card; Special Summon 1 "Diabell" monster from your hand or GY. You can only use each effect of "Like the Diabell" once per turn.
eff: If a Spell/Trap(s) is sent to the GY by a card effect: Set 1 Spell/Trap from your hand or GY, but it cannot be activated this turn. During your Main Phase: You can banish 3 Spells/Traps from your GY, including this card; Special Summon 1 "Diabell" monster from your hand or GY. You can only use each effect of "Like the Diabell" once per turn.

action: Activates if other cards are sent to the Graveyard
mst: Prevents activation of your Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your Trap Cards
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
